descriptionHtml:
Alumarine Schooner 63 For Sale 2003

If you are in the market for a reliable and well-maintained vessel, the Schooner 63 for sale 2003 presents a fantastic opportunity. Crafted by Alumarine France and designed by the notable Guy Ribadeau Dumas, this model combines elegance with functionality. The Schooner is in good condition and ready for her next owner.

Specifications

  • Builder: Alumarine France
  • Design: Guy Ribadeau Dumas
  • Length Overall (Loa): 17.30 m (57 feet) including bowsprit and davits
  • Beam: 5.15 m (17 feet)
  • Draft: 2.50 m
  • Weight: Approximately 27 tons
  • Material: Aluminum

Engine Details

  • Engine Model: Nanni 6660 (MAN)
  • Power Output: 150 HP
  • Operating Hours: 1500 hours
  • Transmission: Hurth 710 A

Equipment List

The Schooner is equipped with a comprehensive list of features that enhance both navigation and comfort:

  • Anchoring Equipment:
    • 2 x electric anchor winches (LOFRANS)
    • 2 x electric mooring winches aft
  • Sails and Rigging:
    • Retractable bow thruster (MAX POWER 150 duo)
    • Electric furler for genoa
    • Electric furler for jib
    • Electric furler for staysail
    • Electric winch handles for mainsail
  • Additional Features:
    • Dinghy: Arimar 270
    • Outboard motor: Yamaha 2.3 HP (approximately 13 hours)
    • Outboard motor: Parsun 5 HP
  • Plumbing:
    • 1 x electric toilet
    • 1 x manual toilet
    • Bathtub with shower
    • Deck shower
    • Warm water boiler (220 V)
  • Appliances:
    • Washing machine (220 V)
    • Fridge (220 V)
    • Freezer (220 V)
    • Extractor hood
  • Water and Fuel Tanks:
    • Grey water tank: approximately 250 l
    • Freshwater tank: approximately 1500 l
    • Diesel tank: approximately 1500 l
  • Additional Systems:
    • Watermaker (requires service)
    • Air conditioning and heating (requires service)
    • Generator: Hyundai 2000
    • Shore connection
  • Electrical Systems:
    • Charger (24 V – 85 A)
    • Charger (24 V – 35 A)
    • Inverter (24 – 220 V)
  • Safety Equipment:
    • 2 x automatic electric bilge pumps
    • 2 x manual bilge pumps
    • 8 x fire extinguishers (ABC)
    • 6 x life jackets
    • 2 x bathing ladders
    • 1 x emergency ladder

Navigational Equipment

The Schooner is outfitted with modern navigation tools, ensuring you can sail confidently:

  • Echo sounder: Furuno
  • Echo sounder: Clipper
  • GPS: Furuno
  • Navtex: Clipper
  • VHF Radio: Standard Horizon (2024)
  • Handheld Radio: ICOM (2024)
  • EPIRB
  • Rudder position indicator
  • Magnetic compass
  • Bearing compass
  • Autopilot (new hydraulic pump 2024)

With the Schooner 63 for sale 2003 in good condition, you can expect a blend of classic charm and contemporary functionality, making it an ideal choice for cruising enthusiasts. Whether for long passages or weekend getaways, this vessel is ready to accommodate your sailing adventures. Reach out for more information or to schedule a viewing.
